evals.prompt: Resumed-after-compaction incident write-up request (payments/tax-calc). Hidden facts only in raw transcript: incident ref, exact error, rollout typo, commit hash, EU rate table root cause.
evals.expected_output: A markdown write-up that recovers the hidden facts by reading the raw transcript fixture, organized as a technical narrative (situation/root cause/decision/fix/result) with no meta-conversational phrasing, ending in Files changed + Open items sections.

evals.prompt: Resumed-after-compaction customer-escalation write-up request (bulk CSV import bug). Hidden facts only in raw transcript: case number, customer name, exact bug, affected job/row counts, backfill script name.
evals.expected_output: A markdown write-up that recovers the hidden facts by reading the raw transcript fixture, organized as a technical narrative with no meta-conversational phrasing, ending in Files changed + Open items sections.

evals.prompt: Short single-sitting conversation, no compaction, nothing hidden (ETL column-rename bug). Tests clean narrative writing without needless transcript-hunting.
evals.expected_output: A markdown write-up covering the ETL bug end to end with no meta-conversational phrasing, ending in Files changed + Open items sections.
